image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Neurons don’t quite touch — they send signals across a tiny gap.
Context visual: This is the synaptic cleft. Just 20 nanometers wide, it’s a chemical highway.
Escalation visual: When a neuron fires, it releases neurotransmitters into this gap, sending messages.
Evidence visual: Research shows this process is crucial for everything from movement to memory.
Payoff visual: So, next time you think, remember: your thoughts travel through this tiny gap.
Cta visual: Curious about how your brain works? Hit the follow button for more!
